title: Totem of Iron
description: A mod That Adds a custom Iron totem (Animated) big update soon!
body:
🎭 _ Features_

✅ Replaces Totem of Undying with a Iron Animated Totem 🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks 🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and streamer swaps Custom GUI (Soon) Custom Background (Soon) Custom Armor and Weapons (Soon) Custom End Crystals and Respawn Anchors (Soon) PvP Utilities (Soon) 🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.19+ Join Our Discord for Support
